name: Blender Bearnaise
recipeIngredient: 3/4 cup Butter; Melted and Kept Hot
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the first five ingredients in a blender container.
2. With the blender running, slowly add one third of the melted butter in a slow steady stream.
3. Turn the blender on high speed and continue to add the remaining butter gradually.
4. Gently fold in the snipped parsley.
5. Serve with meat, fish, or poultry.
Makes 3/4 cup.
